sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35776" key="e)nneadiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννεα-δικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n35776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">based on</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calculated by division by nine,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγωγή, [κλιμακτήρ]</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:147:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">147.31</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:148:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">148.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
